description: Style NoteLeave behind your cares of wondering how to carry your vacation shopping back home with this foldable travel bag from nike. Roll it up into a small ball when not in use and open it for a copious space.Product DetailsMade of nylon polyester blended fabric for durability and easy maintenanceHas one main roomy compartment Printed branding on the frontNike tag on the left sideAdjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesMaterial and CareNylon polyester blended fabricRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine washSize MeasurementHeight: 47cmWidth: 34cm
